problem id: 3d24aef4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00111001 -> 11001001
  00101000 -> 01000001
  01111001 -> 11001011
  10000011 -> 00011101
  11011111 -> 11111111
  11110000 -> 10000110
  01110011 -> 10011011
  00001000 -> 01000000
  01101100 -> 01100011

query: 10010100
predicted answer: 10100101
